title: Refund policy
text: Customers can request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds above 500 dollars require manual review by the billing team. Refunds are not available for accounts closed for policy abuse.

title: Password reset troubleshooting
text: If a user cannot sign in, ask them to use the password reset flow. Reset links expire after 15 minutes. Support agents must not ask users to share passwords or one-time codes.

title: Enterprise SSO setup
text: Enterprise administrators can configure SAML single sign-on from the admin console. The identity provider metadata URL and certificate are required before activation.

title: Data retention policy
text: Workspace audit logs are retained for 365 days on enterprise plans. Deleted user content is removed from primary storage within 30 days and from backups within 90 days.

title: API rate limits
text: The public API allows 600 requests per minute per workspace. Enterprise customers can request higher limits. Rate limit errors return HTTP 429 with a retry-after header.

title: Account closure process
text: Account closure is irreversible after the 14-day recovery window. Support agents must verify account ownership and escalate enterprise account closures to the account team.
